notes: No defensible public national terminal-by-terminal storage capacity dataset is currently loaded. The dashboard uses PM&C MSO reserve volumes and APS stock series as national/product storage context.
citation: Fuel Resilience AU source review; PM&C reserve volumes and APS stock series remain the loaded public storage context.

investigated_sources.name: Geoscience Australia - National Liquid Fuel Terminals 2015
investigated_sources.result: Location snapshot only; does not provide terminal-by-terminal capacity, product stock, outage status or live inventory.

missing_coverage: state/product terminal capacity with date and units
